name: asr-software-forge
description: Two-mode software development system. BUILD mode: bespoke fullstack applications from scratch with anti-slop design process, PRD generation, architecture decisions, and intentional UI. CONTRIBUTE mode: work on existing team repositories (Zealogics, open-source) with codebase onboarding, convention detection, branch management, testing, and PR creation. Supports multi-cloud deployment (Vercel, GCP, AWS, Azure, Railway, Fly.io). Planning happens in ai-os-project, code lives in separate repos. Adapts to any tech stack — doesn't force Next.js on everything.
